positioning.who: Adult content creators, entertainers, media brands
positioning.what: A creator-first entertainment and media company that amplifies adult creators through storytelling, distribution, and audience development
positioning.statement: Luv Media Group empowers adult creators to own their voice, grow their audiences, and distribute content without compromise.

tone.dos: ['Speak directly to creators', 'Celebrate individuality and ownership', 'Use inviting and affirming language']
tone.donts: ['Avoid corporate jargon', 'Avoid legal or technical heavy language', 'Avoid condescension']

visuals.logo: LUV Media approved monogram and wordmark only

positioning.who: Businesses, creators, and teams needing reliable digital execution
positioning.what: A production and development studio delivering websites, apps, and systems with precision
positioning.statement: IRI Productions builds and delivers digital products with clarity, stability, and technical confidence.

tone.dos: ['Use clear and precise language', 'Focus on outcomes and reliability', 'Maintain a professional tone']

visuals.palette: Neutral / technical palette separate from Luv Media
